description: A modal interruption that stops the user and captures an explicit response. Reserved for destructive confirmations, blocking errors, critical mismatches, and high-risk warnings.

variants.name: Warning
variants.description: Prevents a mistake. User must choose between proceeding or stopping. Second button: neutral secondary.

variants.name: Error
variants.description: Signals a blocking failure that cannot be bypassed without acknowledgement. Second button: neutral secondary.

variants.name: Destructive
variants.description: Confirms an irreversible or high-regret action. The safe exit is the primary button. The destructive action is the second button with red styling.

variants.name: Info
variants.description: Neutral interruption requiring acknowledgement. Can be shown with one or two buttons.

primaryAction.description: When false, only the secondary/acknowledge button is shown. Use for acknowledge-only Info/Warning dialogs.

title.description: Short, explicit heading. Prefer question format when asking for a decision.

description.description: Body text. 1–3 lines maximum. No paragraphs.

overlay.description: Full-screen semi-transparent backdrop. Blocks interaction with content beneath. Not focusable or interactable.

dialog-card.description: Rounded sheet anchored to the bottom of the screen. Scrollable if content overflows. Contains all dialog content.

icon-container.description: 80×80px circle with type-specific background color. Holds a 40×40px product icon.

title.description: Short, explicit heading centre-aligned. Prefer question format for decision dialogs.

body.description: Body text, centre-aligned. 1–3 lines maximum. No paragraphs.

actions.description: Vertical stack of 1–2 full-width pill buttons. Primary (safe) action first, second (risky/destructive) action below.

actionRules.acknowledgeOnly: Use 1 action (primary only, showSecondaryAction=false) for Info/Warning when no real choice exists.
actionRules.buttonOrder: Safe/recommended action = primary button (top). Risky/irreversible action = second button (bottom).
actionRules.destructiveStyling: Apply destructive button style ONLY to the action that causes loss or irreversibility — never to the safe exit.

dismissBehavior.strict: No close icon. User must choose an action. Recommended.
dismissBehavior.permissive: Close icon allowed on Info/Warning only. Never on Destructive or Error.

accessibility.focusOnOpen: First action button or dialog container
accessibility.escapeKey: Only for permissive governance on Info/Warning types

usageExamples.title: Pickup address correct?
usageExamples.description: Your current location and pickup address do not match. Do you want to order from this address?
usageExamples.context: Critical mismatch check — triggered when the user's current GPS location does not match the selected pickup pin. Customer App.

whenNotToUse.scenario: Lightweight recoverable issues with quick actions (Undo/Retry)
